crime.value: Murder of a seventeen-year-old boy named Vincent in a forest, stabbed and buried
crime.quote: he placed the cool knife against his heaving chest. I had made him beautiful all over again, covered in such a lush red.

victim.value: Vincent, a seventeen-year-old boy who was targeted for his youth and beauty, entered forest on a dare while drunk
victim.quote: His only fault, was being beautiful. Youth is a gift... Seventeen was his targeted age

closed_world.value: Dense forest beyond crowded roads, isolated from the bustling town where people go about their daily lives unaware
closed_world.quote: Somewhere beyond the crowded roads lies a forest with dense white fog settling low to the ground.

culprit_and_motive.value: An unnamed killer motivated by preserving youth and beauty before it can fade, believing he provides 'salvation'
culprit_and_motive.quote: he is the salvation of all youth... If all beauty is wiped out, than it can never fade.

investigator.value: A boy who witnesses the crime through nightmares/visions, waking from what he wishes was just a dream
investigator.quote: a boy wakes from his nightmare, gasping... The boy only wished it had been a nightmare

red_herring.value: Initial forest setting and mysterious figure suggest external threat, but revelation shows it's a boy's nightmare/vision
red_herring.quote: A deer hangs in mid leap, ants freeze on the leaf strewn ground... as a boy wakes from his nightmare

clue_fairness.value: Reader experiences the murder scene directly, seeing all details the narrator-boy sees in his vision
clue_fairness.quote: The azure eyes of the dead stare up at him, and their glassy stare gives him a thrill

social_world.value: Contrast between oblivious urban normalcy and hidden forest violence - city dwellers vs. predatory outsider
social_world.quote: The people on the busy city streets... do not know what has taken place in the forest

reveal_mechanic.value: Reality shifts from objective third-person narrative to revealed subjective nightmare/vision experience
reveal_mechanic.quote: Colors merge to form a black abyss as a boy wakes from his nightmare, gasping

media_and_audience.value: Forest positioned as keeper of secrets unknown to conventional society - nature as silent witness
media_and_audience.quote: The only witnesses are the silent trees and the frightened deer

investigator_wound.value: Boy-narrator traumatized by violent visions he wishes were mere nightmares but knows are true
investigator_wound.quote: The boy only wished it had been a nightmare, one awful dream that would never be true

_meta.title: ebook m m k and aaron kelley within the forest
